note: SYNTHESIZED from ST 1.18.0 source, not captured. Per-marker ROLE override: the Prompt Manager collection prompt's role is copied onto the marker before expansion (openai.js:1468-1477, `prompt.role = collectionPrompt.role ?? prompt.role`). charPersonality is emitted as role=user and worldInfoAfter as role=assistant; the rest stay system. Adapter-verify at Phase-2 wiring; replace with source:'captured' per RUNBOOK.md. Prose is RPT-authored + scrambled; ST default strings overridden with ORP_ sentinels.

input.description: charPersonality role=user, worldInfoAfter role=assistant; other markers keep role=system.
